feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can we connect Service Cloud V1 and V2 to the same S4 HANA tenant. ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts. 

We want to explore Service Cloud V2 and the user story appears that it is possible to connect V1 and V2 running on the same S4 HANA tenant?

entry.title: SAP SD - Organizational Structure
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Requirement is a ad service company who has different product types calles weedmaps, canveya and ads and each product types will have different other services associated with it and also it has different pricing procedures. But customer wants to have a single invoice to be billed out for all these different products types with different pricing. How can we approach this by sales org, distribution channel and division? Or should I use any other field other than the org elements. I need to take a decision on how many sales org, distr chnl and division this customer can have. 
Please give me some advise.

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Issue with Depreciation Area Values in Assets
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We have encountered an issue with the modification of depreciation area values in our assets module, and we are seeking guidance/ideas/support on how to address it.

More specifically, whenever we modify values in depreciation area 01, it automatically impacts depreciation area 02. Similarly modifications in depreciation area 20 affect area 21 and so forth. However, for our IFRS reporting purposes, we require depreciation area 02 to maintain its own distinct values separate from those of area 01.

This issue has become particularly problematic following a recent merger, during which asset values were transferred in local currency and converted. Unfortunately, we neglected to transfer these values into euros, resulting in discrepancies between the original company's euro values and the exchange rates used during the conversion process.

We are seeking assistance in resolving this issue to ensure accurate reporting in accordance with IFRS standards. Could you please advise if there is a transaction type or alternative approach that would allow us to modify depreciation area values independently without impacting other areas?

Your prompt attention to this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: S/4 HANA Certification badge
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community.

I have just passed the C_TS4FI_2021 exam, however I have received the badge for the 2023 edition (S/4 HANA Cloud). Currently querying with SAP.

Did anyone come across anything similar?

Many thanks.

Olga Mihai

entry.title: S4HANA Material segmentation - POOL search
entry.content:
Dear Sap Experts,

I am working on S4HANA  material segmentation and logic for ATP Pool in SGT_SETUP.

I have a requirement to use 1 material , 1 segmentation strategy with different Pool search depending on the customer.

  • For 95% of the customers the search should be done among all MMBE availability in ration 1:m. The qty in SO should be confirmed if there is availability of the material in any stock segment but not only in the segment stated in SO . However, in my scenario we are not even going to register a requirement segment. So for this group of customers the qty should be confirmed as long as there is available qty for the material in MMBE.
  • For 5 % of the customers the search should not be done among all MMBE availability but it should be done in ratio 1:1 i.e. the qty in SO should be confirmed ONLY if there is availability for the material with requirement segment stated in SO.

 

I am trying to set up the requirement using SGT_SETUP -> Stock allocation  and ATP Pool.

The set up is:

 

 

Then the ATP pool is:

 

 

The problem is that the set up works for 95% of the customers i.e. the search is done among the values in Pool1.

However, for 5% of the customers if I create a SO with requirement segment 10000252 CN001 the ATP is performed again among all stock segments but not 1:1.

I can not find a way to set up the Pools per customer.

Best regards,

Diliana and Teodora

entry.title: Material segmentation Default and invalid blank value
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I am working on a material segmentation setup in S4Hana. In TC: SGT_SETUP for 1 material and 1 segmentation strategy I need to set two different default logics for the SO field - Requirement segment.

I need the two different default logics since I aim to have different behaviors of the Requirement segment field in SO depending on my customers.

For 95% of my customers, I need to have a blank and valid requirement segment field in SO. This works and can be done. Based on this set up I can create a complete SO with a blank requirement segment. It seems the blank segment is automatically set to default, so in this scenario, blank is both the Default and Valid segment.

For 5% of my customers, I have to make sure the Requirement segment field in SO is incomplete i.e. the requirement segment shouldn't have a default, and the blank shouldn't be valid. This way for 5% of the customers It will not be possible a SO to be completed unless users enter a valid Requirement segment value.

So, to meet the requirements for 5% of the customer I need the option to set the requirement segment for those 5% - the blank segment should not be valid and I don't need to have a default. However, as already mentioned,  if there is a blank value it is always the default. 

Please advise if there is a way the described behavior to be done via default set up or in any other way.

Your input will be highly appreciated

Regards

DiliK

entry.title: Unable to connect SAP Content Server to S/4 Hana 2023
entry.content:
Hello,

we have an SAP Content Server, connected to the ERP landscape and now I am trying to connect an S/4 Hana system to it and it doesn't work.
I have created the repository in OAC0, it works fine, I created the DMS system in OACT, but when I try to test with the report RSCMST, it doesn't work 😞

While the first check RSCMSTH0 works fine, next check RSCMSTH1 comes back with an error:

Specify a file name in directory "/usr/sap/<SID>/SYS/global" "(KPRO_IMPORT_EXPORT)"

Message No. SG808

Diagnosis

You have specified the file name "/usr/sap/<SID>/SYS/global" "(KPRO_IMPORT_EXPORT)". However your system administrator has specified that this is a subdirectory in which you need to specify a file name.

System Response

It is not possible to access the file "/usr/sap/<SID>/SYS/global" "(KPRO_IMPORT_EXPORT)"

Procedure 

Add a file name to the subdirectory ". You can also specify a file name in another subdirectory of ".

 

And unfortunately this is the best state I could bring that to. In transaction FILE I have entered the following settings under Logical File Name Definition, Cross-Client:

Log. File KPRO_IMPORT_EXPORT -> this one cannot be edited
Name <FILENAME>
Physical file /usr/sap/<SID>/SYS/global
Data format DIR
Applicat. area -> I left that one empty
Logical path -> I left that one empty too

An interesting point is, that in the ERP systems there is no KPRO_IMPORT_EXPORT under Logical File Path Definition in transaction FILE.

What am I doing wrong ? I cannot understand why it gives "path" "KPRO_IMPORT_EXPORT", I did not leave a blank anywhere ? Please kindly advise how to solve this. Many thanks!

entry.title: Define Table(CDS) with nested structure like JSON
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

I want to create a 'define table ' with CDS view just like the below nested json

Later I would like to use this in fiori app also hence please suggest how to do

entry.title: SAP Subscription Billing, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Clarification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a customer with SAP Subscription Billing solution, with integration of 57Z. Has anyone used this solution of 57Z? 

Please correct me if I'm understanding correctly.

First, we have to create subscriptions, rate elements and products in SUB BILL system and then subscriptions are replicated as provider contracts, rate elements and products are replicated as products in SAP.

In SAP we initially thought it has to be Sales Order or Sales Contract, but I tried to create a sales order with subscription products manually created inside SAP with SBPD, SBRE material type it said there is no item category available for subscription products, could anybody clarify that possible to create a sales order with subscription products?

Then I searched SAP help portal that it has to be a solution order in SAP with service items, sales items and subscription items can be added and when released it will create subsequent documents automatically.

But I can't find one created for subscription products. Also, should we need to create any subscription products manually inside SAP or only via replication handled? If so to create manually, do we need valuation class? Also, couldn't find one for subscription products created.

Also, replications is not working properly maintained below settings in the integration settings for Subscription Billing system.

Please correct me on the inputs of above data in screenshots and what should be the values for source tenant for customer ID?

Please advise.

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP Subscription Billing SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Issue in custom purchase requisition app after SAPUI5 version upgrade
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

We have recently upgraded the SAPUI5 version to 1.71.64 as suggested by SAP post SP upgrade as we were having issues with few finance Fiori apps.

 

After the upgrade, finance apps errors were resolved. However, now we are facing one issue in custom app where unwanted field is appearing on the screen. If this is not fixed, then business processes will be affected.

 

Can you please let me know if there are any KBAs for any changes to be done in custom apps post SAPUI5 version upgrade.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Krutika Rani

entry.title: How to make product type group mandatory in creating PR?
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Is there any way we can mandatory the Product type group in PR. As of now we need to select the product type for services and goods procurement. But we want that it will be select for both type of procurement automatically. Also note that we are not using services as material Instead we create services PR on short Text. Or any suggestion related to this.

Thanks

entry.title: Master Data Replication From S/4HANA Core to S/4HANA Central RAR
entry.content:
Hi Experts - 

I have a scenario where RAR component is decoupled from S/4HANA.

Now we have 2 systems -

1. S/4HANA CORE

2. S/4HANA RAR

I have to replicate RAR relevant master data (example - BP) from S/4HANA CORE to S/4HANA RAR.

Possible options are

1. IDOC

2. SOAP via DRF through CPI

3. SOAP via DRF direct

I wanted to get some insights on the possible 3 approaches.

Please comment.

entry.title: Stuck update in sm13
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have been getting these dump along with stuck update in my customers systems.

Category ABAP programming error
Runtime Errors DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR
Except. CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB
ABAP Program SAPLV50U
Application Component LE-SHP
Date and Time 15.04.2024 12:42:49 (CET)

 

Short Text
Open SQL array insert produces duplicate records in the database.

 

What happened?
Error in the ABAP application program.

The current ABAP program "SAPLV50U" had to be terminated because it
statement that could not be executed.

 

What can I do?
Note which actions and entries caused the error to occur.

Consult your SAP administrator.

Using transaction ST22 for ABAP dump analysis, you can view, manage
and retain termination messages for longer periods.
Note which actions and entries caused the error to occur.

Consult your SAP administrator.

Using transaction ST22 for ABAP dump analysis, you can view, manage
and retain termination messages for longer periods.

Error analysis
An exception has occurred in class "CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB". This exception was not
caught
in procedure "LIPS_VERBUCHEN" "(FORM)" or propagated by a RAISING clause.
Since the caller of the procedure could not have anticipated this
exception, the current program was terminated.
The reason for the exception occurring was:
The reason for the exception is:
When an Open SQL array insert is performed, trying to insert a record
into the database table "LIPS" causes the function to terminate if a
record with the same key already exists.

(When an Open SQL individual record insert is performed, this situation
does not cause the function to terminate. SY-SUBRC is set to 4 instead.)

I want to know what is the exact reason for this error and as a basis consultant what i should do. Also some updates have created a dump and some did not what does this mean.

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Not authorized to create custom business object ZZ1_YUGYUGUY
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am using S4 hana on premise system qky-910 and I have SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR and SAP_BR_EXTENSIBILITY_SPEC assigned to my user.
Now, when i am trying to create new custom business object I am getting Not authorized to create custom business object ZZ1_YUGYUGUY error.


Please let me know if any additional roles are required for the same.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility  SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Entity missing in OData Service, because of S/4 Version
entry.content:
Hi experts!

we want to use use an API Customer Return (A2X) | SAP Help Portal in our S/4 Hana System. We want to use the Entity "Item Text". The Problem is, that our S/4 Release Version is 2020 and the Entity "Item Text" is only available from Version 2021 on. The company currently doesn't want to upgrade the S/4 Release. Does anyone know a solution to make use of the Entity "Item Text"?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: SAP Subscription Billing, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Clarification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

One quick question on the SAP EVENT MESH activation for Subscription Billing and SAP S/4HANA. Do we need to have 1NN business event handling enabled for public cloud or is there any standard out of the box event messaging can be used without having to have additional license for 1NN? @stefan_kiene 

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SAP Subscription Billing SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management SAP Event Management SAP Event Broker for SAP cloud applications 

Thanks!

entry.title: Overall budget exceeded error VS Annual budget exceeded error
entry.content:
We were just upgraded to S4 on January 1st this year. When we tried to post invoices with SAP function module BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE, sometimes we got the expense exceeded the budget errors. My question is that why sometimes we got the "overall budget exceeded" error and sometimes we got the "annual budget exceeded" errors. What attributes make S4 to check the expense against the overall budget instead of annual budget? Is there a flag in the imported parameters of BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE can make S4 to check the expense against the annual budget instead of overall budget? Thank you in advance for your help!

Fisher Li

entry.title: S4H OnPrem 2022 Initial SP - Assign Handling Unit to Outbound Delivery by BAPI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
 
We want to assign HU to outbound delivery by C# .NET Code. We confirmed with SAP experts, there is no API can be used to achieve this requirement in S4HANA 2022.
But they said maybe BAPI can do that.

We found SAP connector for Microsoft .Net allows developers to use BAPIs and remote-enabled function modules in any .NET application.
 
I searched some articles about using BAPI to assign handling unit to outbound delivery.
One article says BAPI BAPI_HU_CHANGE_HEADER can do that, I use the article as reference, but it still failed to assign the HU to outbound delivery.
 
Can anyone give me some idea whether BAPI_HU_CHANGE_HEADER be used to assign HU to outbound delivery? If yes, can you provide some sample codes or documents for me?

If no, any other BAPIs can be used to do that?
 
Below is the link for the article.
https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/delivery-and-shipment-handling-units/ba-p/13336462
 
Thanks

entry.title: How to bring tasks from multiple backends(CRM/ECC) to fiori inbox
entry.content:
Hi 

we are migrating from ECC to S/4 HANA on-premise edition.  we need to bring tasks from multiple backends (CRM/ECC) into fiori my inbox.  So user can access both tasks from one point.

2486885 - My Inbox error "Resource not found for the segment 'TaskCollection'"

If you are running S/4HANA 2020 or above in an embedded deployment, remember  to make sure that service TASKPROCESSING points only to LOCAL_TGW system alias

Any documentation available to configure the above scenario.

Thanks

Shankar

entry.title: How to extend CNSETTLRULE to include COPA Fields?
entry.content:
CNSETTLERULE report doesn't have COPA characteristics fields. How to extend CNSETTLERULE report to display the below listed fields:

Table: CE4GM00_ACCT / CE4GM00

Unit of Measure
Trading Partner
Sold-to Country
Producing Plant
Product Type
Product Line
Other
Sales Program
Country of Origin


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
